[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the villians are incredibly shallow"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it's easily the most lackluster game in the entire extended series in expressing what it really wants to be"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "sexual assault bad = standard take, kamoshida bad = life-changing revelation"}, {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the player is almost never asked to seriously doubt the righteousness of the core formula"}]},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the music is fire"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the story is great"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the characters are memorable"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the gameplay is good"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Slow start"}, {"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Finishing the game feels like a true end of an era"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The soundtrack is phenomenal"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it's a good SPACE game with a ton of freedom"}, {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I have the freedom to go to any planet, reset myself in a different universe all together, romance my companions, and fly any ship I want"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "This game has come a long way"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "loading screens"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it's gotten better over the years and since the last DLC and patch"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "full of procedurally generated crap"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "soulless randomly generated nothing"}]},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "servers are shut down"}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "They deadass took the servers down"}]},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "THEY DEADASS TOOK THE ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ SERVERS DOWN AFTER 3 YEARS"}]},

  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Relaxing game"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "nice map"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "many dlc's,trucks,city's and much more"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Really worth getting"}]},

  {"idx": 33, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "A world of possibilities in your PC"}, {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Highly addictive"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Runs even on potato"}]},

]

  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "constant pop up errors"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "horrible lag"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "crashing, freezing"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "game outright REFUSING to load maps"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 of cash down the drain"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 more expensive than it should be"}]},
